name: Sovereign Maps Lead Scout to CSV

assignments.name: searches
assignments.value: ={{$env.APIFY_GOOGLE_MAPS_SEARCHES || 'lead generation agency,outbound agency,RevOps agency,B2B marketing agency,AI automation agency'}}

nodes.name: Run Apify Google Maps Actor
nodes.notes: Requires APIFY_API_TOKEN and APIFY_GOOGLE_MAPS_ACTOR_ID in the n8n environment.

nodes.name: Normalize to Sovereign CSV
nodes.notes: Output contains a csv field and a rows array. Append rows to Google Sheets or download csv from execution output.

assignments.name: summary
assignments.value: =Sovereign Maps Scout produced {{$json.rows_found}} review-ready rows and rejected {{$json.rejected_count}} risky rows.

assignments.name: next_step
assignments.value: Paste csv into Google Sheets or connect a Google Sheets Append node to $json.rows. Sovereign will import from your sheet or run Maps import directly.
